previousFindings.note: All 5 critical/high findings from grill pass 1 have been fixed

findings.title: Dead outer catch block in dedup-skills body parsing
findings.issue: Body parsing had `.catch(() => ({}))` on the await, making the outer try-catch unreachable.
findings.fix: Removed .catch() from await, let outer try-catch handle errors

findings.title: Unsafe `as any` cast in enrichment deprecated shard removal
findings.issue: `buildSearchEntry({ ...skill, isDeprecated: true } as any)` suppressed type checking.
findings.fix: Pass `skill` directly — buildSearchEntry doesn't need isDeprecated, and skill already has all SkillForSearchEntry fields from the select
